arts.ttl: Manchester United dealt Victor Osimhen transfer 'reality' as Dan Ashworth new club 'revealed'
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United news and transfer rumours as Victor Osimhen continues to be linked with a move to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Hidden consequences of Sir Jim Ratcliffe's cost-cutting at Manchester United are coming
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe's radical cost-cutting at Old Trafford continues and withdrawing small perks has shattered staff morale.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Erik ten Hag shares future plans as struggling Rasmus Hojlund defended
arts.sum: Manchester United have gone three games without a win in the Premier League and will be keen to pick up an important victory against relegation strugglers Ipswich this Wednesday

arts.ttl: Man United facing Premier League competiton for Atalanta star Ademola Lookman?
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly facing competition from Newcastle United in the battle to sign Atalanta forward Ademola Lookman.

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth 'takes his first job' since being brutally sacked by Man United as humiliated ex-sporting director lands surprising role
arts.sum: Former Man United sporting director Dan Ashworth has reportedly landed a new role outside football, three months after leaving Old Trafford. The 53-year-old was abruptly axed in December.

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth joins new club in first role since Man Utd admitted £4.1m blunder
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth has taken on his first role following the end of his short-lived spell at Manchester United and is lending his expertise to another sporting world, albeit on a freelance basis

arts.ttl: Arsenal make striker offer as Man Utd's and Chelsea's Osimhen plans confirmed: FT recap
arts.sum: Arsenal make striker offer as Man Utd's and Chelsea's Osimhen plans confirmed: FT recap Plus, the transfer plans of Chelsea and Man Utd regarding Victor Osimhen were confirmed and England star Marc Guehi made a decision on his next move.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag: Ex-Man Utd manager reveals career plans
arts.sum: Former Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag has been out of work since he was sacked by the Red Devils in October.

arts.ttl: Revealed: How Man United told staff they would be making 200 MORE redundancies... after giving them pie, chips and water in plastic cups
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Shortly before 2.30pm on Monday, hundreds of worried staff filed into the Manchester Suite at Old Trafford to hear about the latest threat to their jobs.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Romano REVEALS Osimhen plan as Amorim demands signing
arts.sum: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Romano REVEALS Osimhen plan as Amorim demands signing All the latest Man Utd transfer news in one place, including updates on Victor Osimhen, Alejandro Garnacho and Geovany Quenda .
